rulings.Case Title: ZHOU BIN CHEN et al VS. ALICE YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion By Plaintiffs For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint

Hearing Held- Plaintiff's Motion to Leave to File Second Amended Complaint is taken under submission. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 26, 2013, line 2. -DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, AND BANK OF NEW YORK MELLONS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint demurrer is sustained n part and overruled in part: Demurrer is OVERRULED as to causes of action for (1) breach of contract - P sufficiently alleges that $12,319 and $21,491.12 were never applied to interest, principal or any other obligation under the Note; (2) violation of 2924 and 2924.17 - moving party fails to cite any authorities specifically barring private right of action under 2924, the statute itself does not limit the enforcement; (3) violation of credit reporting acts - violation of 15 U.S.C. 1681s is sufficiently alleged; (4) conversion - sufficiently alleged. See 35(d). Demurer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to (1) negligence- to allege facts giving rise to duty of care; (2) violation of fair debt collection practices act- to allege facts showing that Defendants are "debt collectors" within the meaning of FDCPA; (3) slander of title- to allege "direct and immediate pecuniary loss;" (4) violation of 2344 - to allege all elements of this cause of action, statutory or common law; (5) declaratory relief- to allege non-duplicative actual controversy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSER COMPANIES VS. MICHAEL MCDONALD et al
